ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., R, PG) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "score" REAL /* Average score of the movie (out of 10) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer of the movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the star of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of production */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in dollars */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross revenue of the movie in dollars */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* A short, catchy phrase that summarizes the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* A brief summary of the movie's plot */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the production ended */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards the movie has received */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the movie's trailer */,
  "trailer_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the movie's trailer */,
  "trailer_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the movie's trailer */,
  "trailer_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the movie's trailer */,
  "trailer_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares on the movie's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  "popularity" REAL /* A measure of the genre's popularity (e.g., average rating of movies in this genre) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Director's birth date */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Director's death date (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards the director has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Writer's birth date */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Writer's death date (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Writer's nationality */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards the writer has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the star */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Star's birth date */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Star's death date (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Star's nationality */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards the star has received */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of social media followers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)
